title: Velvet Quinoa Delight
description: A rich and velvety Peruvian dish featuring quinoa that has been fermented for a meal-prep friendly keto-friendly option.
instructions: Rinse quinoa under cold water for about 30 seconds. Place in a pot with 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover. Simmer for about 15 minutes or until water is absorbed.
In a blender, combine coconut milk, lime juice, ginger, garlic, fish sauce, salt, and sesame seeds. Blend well.
Add the cooked quinoa into the blending mixture and blend again until smooth and creamy.
Serve hot as a side dish or over vegetables.
